dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry condition 1: Next bullish candle crosses above high of bearish candle using crosses_above with prev_high. Entry condition 2: Previous candle was comparatively large bearish by checking body size > ATR_14. Entry condition 3: Bearish candle retracement check—prev_low stays above support level s1, ensuring less than 50% retracement of uptrend. Exit uses reversal below the bearish candle low. Stop loss and hold period set conservatively for this mean-reversion setup.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry condition 1: Next bullish candle crosses above high of bearish candle using crosses_above with prev_high. Entry condition 2: Previous candle was comparatively large bearish by checking body size > ATR_14. Entry condition 3: Bearish candle retracement check—prev_low stays above support level s1, ensuring less than 50% retracement of uptrend. Exit uses reversal below the bearish candle low. Stop loss and hold period set conservatively for this mean-reversion setup.

source_rule_text: When a large bearish candle appears in an uptrend but the immediate next candle is bullish and crosses above the high of the bearish candle, enter long for a sharp price upturn, provided the bearish candle has not erased more than 50% of the previous up move.
